memory.summary: I'd rather grab lunch with my friends than stress about the project right now. That quick chore is tempting, but hanging out feels better.

desires: Connect with cohort_3 immediately to relieve stress and avoid the awkwardness of being alone while they are around
Ignore the term project deadline for now because worrying about it ruins the mood and I'm too impulsive to start deep work
Keep the interaction easy and friction-free by not bringing up the looming deadline or any potential conflicts about time management

goals.description: Immediately join cohort_3 for a casual hangout or meal to relieve stress and avoid being alone.
goals.rationale: My value priorities heavily favor relationships (0.5) over academic tasks (0.15). Being around my close friends reduces my current stress level, and my avoidant nature makes the prospect of facing the empty room alone unbearable right now.

goals.description: Engage in 'leisure_now' activity with the group without mentioning the term project deadline.
goals.rationale: To maintain the friction-free interaction I crave, I must suppress any urge to discuss work. My impulsive nature and short planning horizon mean I will discount the future consequences of ignoring the project entirely in favor of immediate social comfort.

goals.description: Defer starting the term project until later (or never today).
goals.rationale: Starting deep work feels like a threat to the mood. Given my high procrastination bias (7) and low sleep discipline (3), I will choose the easy win of socializing over the hard task of studying, even though the deadline is approaching.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal g1 (relieve stress via cohort_3) by prioritizing relationships over the deferred project. Avoids the friction of being alone or starting work, satisfying my avoidant/impulsive need for immediate social comfort despite the upcoming deadline.
